title: Initial Inventory
description: Allows you to set an Initial Inventory for a player using ZenScript
body:
Initial Inventory allows you to set what items a player who is joining the world for the first time, will start with.

Check the docs here:

https://docs.blamejared.com/1.14/en/mods/InitialInventory/InitialInventory/

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**.
